summary: Iteration 21 (Tier 5/6 — Friends + Daily Gifts + Trading + Bulk-Pokemon staging persistence + onboarding z-index audit). Backend: 26/26 PASS in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration21.py. Friends list returns same-group peers minus self with first_name/last_seen_at/catches_count/can_send_gift; returns [] when SpawnConfig.social_enabled=False. Daily gifts: send → 3-6 pokeballs, same-day duplicate → 429, cross-group → 403, self-gift → 400, inbox ordered desc, open credits wallet via gift_opened ledger and flips opened=True (re-open returns already_opened=true). Trades: propose enforces same-group + same-rarity + ownership (cross-rarity → 400) and 24h expires_at; accept enforces receiver-only + status==proposed + not-expired + fresh (<10min) positions within trade_proximity_m + re-checked ownership; far-distance accept returns 400 with 'Stand within 30 m'. Successful accept atomically deletes one source catch and inserts a synthetic ball_type='trade'/is_trade=true/traded_from_id=other catch on each side, sets status='accepted' + revert_until=now+24h. Reject works on proposed only (either party). Camper revert works within window; outside window → 400. Admin revert works on ANY accepted trade and stamps reverted_by_admin=true. Social toggle = False blocks /friends (returns []), /gifts/send (403), /trades/propose (403), /trades/accept (403); /trades/reject + /gifts/inbox + /trades list still work. iter_18..20 regression endpoints (/buddy, /streak, /inventory, /raids/active, /pokestops/status, /admin/pokemon, /admin/events, /spawn/current) still 200. Frontend: FriendsPage at /friends ships clean — 3 tabs (friends-tab-friends/gifts/trades), friends-list with friend-row-* + gift-btn-* (gift button correctly shows 'Sent' after send), gifts-empty / gifts-list, trades-list with trade-row-* + correct action buttons by role. open-friends-btn navigates to /friends. CRITICAL FRONTEND BUG: the iter_21 spec requires 'top action row (mute toggle, streak pill, NearbyPanel, ChallengesCard, BuddyStrip) opacity-0 + pointer-events-none while onboarding is showing'. The TOP action row at MapPage.jsx:679 (which contains open-friends-btn, toggle-sound-btn, BallCounter, show-onboarding-btn, open-leaderboard-btn, open-collection-btn, logout-btn) is NOT gated on showOnboarding — verified via DOM inspection: parent classes show 'pointer-events-none safe-top' but NO 'opacity-0' nor 'pointer-events-none' driven by showOnboarding. Only the SECOND row at line 743 (NearbyPanel/ChallengesCard/BuddyStrip) is correctly gated. As a result, the friends/leaderboard/collection/sound-toggle/help/logout buttons remain visually visible AND clickable even while the welcome modal is displayed (visually they sit ABOVE the modal's centered card on mobile because the modal backdrop only covers the lower half on 414×896). This is the same z-index bug iter_20 reported — NOT fixed by iter_21. Bulk-pokemon-upload sessionStorage persistence — code exercise NOT verified end-to-end in browser this run (admin tab routing requires a longer flow; static review below).

minor.issue: Daily-cap counter on the proposer side counts ACCEPTED trades only (line 3767 status='accepted'), so a camper who has 3 PROPOSED trades pending can still propose a 4th. Spec says 'enforces trade_daily_cap' — open question whether proposed trades should count. Currently they do NOT. Director may want to enforce on accepted-only as is, but flag for review.

After all the proximity / cap / ownership checks pass, the function does NOT use a Mongo transaction or atomic $transaction wrapper. Two concurrent /accept calls on the same trade could both pass the t['status']=='proposed' check and both run the swap. Recommend $set with a status guard {id, status:'proposed'} on the update, or wrap in a session transaction. (Same pattern as raid_throw atomic-flip from iter_20.)

catches_count counts ALL catches (including raid + trade synthetics) for each peer — fine. last_seen_at is the camper_position.updated_at; for campers who never opened the app it's None. Spec says 'most recent position' — accurate.

ui_bugs.issue: Top action row (open-friends-btn, toggle-sound-btn, BallCounter, show-onboarding-btn, open-leaderboard-btn, open-collection-btn, logout-btn) is NOT gated on showOnboarding. Only the second row (line 743) hides under onboarding. Spec requires opacity-0 + pointer-events-none on the top row too while showOnboarding=true.

integration_issues.issue: On fresh login, clicking open-friends-btn while welcome modal is up does NOT navigate (modal backdrop intercepts the click at center coords; even though the button has pointer-events:auto, on mobile 414×896 the button is BEHIND the modal). After dismissing onboarding, navigation works fine. Direct nav to /friends works perfectly.

action_items: FRONTEND HIGH: Add `${showOnboarding ? 'opacity-0 pointer-events-none' : ''}` to the top action row container in /app/frontend/src/pages/MapPage.jsx around line 679, mirroring the pattern already used at line 743 for the second row. This is what the iter_21 spec explicitly requires and was carried over from iter_20.

BACKEND MINOR: Wrap /api/trades/{id}/accept's swap in either a status-guarded update (`update_one({id, status:'proposed'}, ...)`) or a Mongo transaction to prevent concurrent double-accept. Today the only safety net is the _has_caught re-check, which would let one of two concurrent acceptors pass and the other 400 — but only by chance.
BACKEND OPTIONAL: Decide whether trade_daily_cap should also count PROPOSED trades. Currently only ACCEPTED ones count toward the cap on the proposer side.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /friends (3522): clean implementation. group_code uppercased on both sides, self-exclusion via {id: {$ne: user.id}}, today_ymd from _local_ymd. GOOD.
server.py /gifts/send (3565): cooldown via daily_gifts.find_one({from, to, sent_ymd}). adjust_ball ledger entry uses 'gift_opened' reason and stores from_camper_id metadata — GOOD audit trail.
server.py /gifts/{id}/open (3619): correct re-open semantics (already_opened path returns 200 without double-crediting). GOOD.

server.py _has_caught (3694): O(1) catches lookup keyed on (group_id, pokemon_id). _delete_one_catch sorts by caught_at ASC so the OLDEST duplicate is removed first — preserves trade-stamped (newer) catches when the kid evolved before reverting. SUBTLE but CORRECT.

server.py _grant_traded_pokemon (3710): inserts ball_type='trade', is_trade=True, traded_from_id=source_camper_id, caught_by='first last' — matches spec. NOTE: power_rolled defaults to pokemon's base power_level (no roll variability); fine for traded copies.
server.py /trades/propose (3738): rarity check, same-group, ownership-on-both-sides, daily cap (accepted only). 24h TTL via TRADE_TTL_HOURS const.

server.py /trades/accept (3813): 5 gates (status, receiver, expiry, proximity, daily cap, ownership re-check). _camper_distance_m returns None if either position is >10min stale or missing. CONCURRENCY RISK: no atomic flip on status — recommend update_one({id, status:'proposed'}, ...) before running the swap.
server.py /admin/trades/{id}/revert (3918): ownership-existence guard, sets reverted_by_admin=true. GOOD audit.
MapPage.jsx 679-740: TOP action row missing the showOnboarding gate that line 743 has. This is the iter_20 carry-over bug — spec for iter_21 explicitly required this fix.

FriendsPage.jsx: fully wired with data-testids on every interactive element (friends-tab-*, friend-row-*, gift-btn-*, gift-row-*, gift-open-*, trade-row-*, trade-accept-*, trade-reject-*, trade-revert-*, trade-cancel-*). 235-line file — no DRY violations spotted.

success_rate.frontend: FriendsPage flow + tabs + open-friends-btn nav: PASS. Onboarding-gated top action row: FAIL (top row not gated). Bulk-pokemon-upload sessionStorage: NOT verified in browser this run.

test_credentials: Admin: admin / Camp1993. Camper: B01 first 2 campers (idx 0,1).
seed_data_creation: test_iteration21.py uses motor to (a) seed camper_positions at PIN coords for proximity-success tests / far coords for proximity-fail, (b) toggle SpawnConfig.social_enabled on the {id:'singleton'} doc, (c) insert catches and trades for swap verification, (d) backdate revert_until past 24h to test revert-window-closed. Cleanup via _delete_test_trades after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter_21 ships 5 NEW collections: daily_gifts, trades. SpawnConfig adds social_enabled (default True), trade_proximity_m (default 30), trade_daily_cap (default 3). The spawn_config singleton doc id is 'singleton' (NOT 'default') — important for direct DB seeding. _local_ymd uses America/New_York. Trade ownership = ANY db.catches doc with group_id=camper_id, pokemon_id=X. After accept: source loses 1 catch, dest gains 1 synthetic catch (ball_type='trade'). Camper revert window = 24h from accept; admin revert has no window.
rca of the issue: FRONTEND z-index gating bug: MapPage.jsx has TWO absolute-positioned rows over the map. Row at line 679 (top action row with friends/sound/leaderboard/collection/logout/help/balls) — NO showOnboarding gate. Row at line 743 (banners/challenges/nearby/buddy) — correctly gated with `${showOnboarding ? 'opacity-0 pointer-events-none' : 'pointer-events-auto'}`. iter_20 already flagged this; iter_21 spec called for it to be fixed. Remediation: copy the same template literal into the className of the line-679 div. Confirmed via DOM inspection while welcome modal is open: friends button parent has classes 'absolute top-2 ... flex items-center justify-between gap-2 z-10 pointer-events-none safe-top' — no opacity-0 anywhere.
